title: Cirrus: One IRC notice only
body:
The podbot messages are becoming obnoxious as more distributions are
tested.  Only call the `success.sh` script once, after all testing was
successful.  Also make update the message to include more helpful text
and url.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: Thanks for checking @mheon .  TBH, ``podbot.py`` is getting long in the tooth, and I'm starting to feel a slight tug toward having a proper interactive bot.  Cirrus has a webhook scheme and API for communicating.  All we need is a persistent VM to listen and respond...oh, and some code to make to actually do stuff :smile:
One last broken thing, it reports URL as ``https://SECRET.com/build/4857214961451008``.  This is because of an encrypted value that can simply be removed...

The message we got on IRC was: 

    podbot_52204240> Cirrus-CI testing successful for PR #2020: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5451464187052032
@mheon @baude PTAL this is ready to go.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
